subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-18 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: If someone goes to Takht Jamshíd [Persepolis], he will see how homes are shut. There is no building that has not been destroyed
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر کسی برود به تخت جمشید  می بیند چطور خانه ها بسته می شود.  هیچ عمارتی نیست که خراب نشود
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
